name: law firms managing 10–20 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed contract renewal dates cause potential legal disputes. We provide automated notifications instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: missed contract renewal dates leading to potential legal disputes
